summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Astreon portfolio website. All core features working correctly including animated background system, navigation, responsive design, and contact form.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile navigation link click has overlay interception causing timeout
ui_bugs.impact: Mobile menu opens correctly, but clicking navigation links may require force click or different approach

passed_tests: Hero section loads with ASTREON title and gradient text
Core pulse animation and status indicator working
Navigation bar with smooth scrolling to all sections
Mobile menu hamburger button toggles correctly
About section with developer portrait and glass cards
Projects section with 4 featured work cards and hover effects
Skills section with tech stack cards (Frontend, Backend, AI/ML, Tools)
Experience stats display (5+ years, 50+ projects, 30+ clients, 99% quality)
Contact form with name, email, message inputs and mocked submission
Contact form success message displays correctly
Animated particle background system with canvas elements
Glassmorphism UI elements (25 glass elements found)
Gradient text effects (11 gradient text elements)
Mouse hover interactions on projects and skills
Responsive design for mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080)
Footer with back to top functionality
Social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter) in hero section
